regime: NEUTRAL macro (regime score 0.5475, VIX ~16.8, 2s10s +27bp, growth+inflation both accelerating) sitting under a late-cycle, fully-invested, low-vol melt-up with a live oil/inflation tail and an UNUSUALLY OPEN US M&A/regulatory window (Ferguson FTC / Assefi DOJ remedy-friendly; 9 of 12 2025 challenges settled, not blocked) that may narrow after the Nov-2026 midterms.
risk_stance: Constructive-but-selective on HARD-DATED event arbitrage right now. The regime confirms the structural-special-sits tilt: the deal/forced-seller machine is hot and the regulator is permissive, so signed all-cash closes and board-approved spins are the fattest, cleanest lane and I will size INTO genuinely dated, well-floored binaries. The two disciplines the regime imposes: (1) the FDA/biotech binaries are the THINNEST-edge lane (run-up priced 4-8wks ahead) AND a single shared risk-on/off factor, so I treat the eight of them as ONE bet and demand a verified hard date + real cash floor before sizing; (2) with BofA FMS cash at a 3.9% sell-signal, ~50% net-OW equities and AI-capex the dominant under-the-tape factor, there is little dry powder to absorb a shock, so I enforce resolution-driver independence and refuse to let the biotech cluster dominate the book. Net: aggressive on the purest standalone, hard-dated, cash-floored asymmetries; patient (stage/watch) on everything undated or soft-dated; and explicitly correlation-capped on the FDA cluster.

assessments.binding_reason: BBP-418 PDUFA hard-dated 2026-11-27 sits on a POSITIVE Phase 3 FORTIFY (p<0.0001), Priority Review, NO AdCom — an approval-given-positive-data gate (~0.85), not a coin-flip; ~$67 vs ~$105 target against a FRANCHISE-backed ~$58 floor ($940M cash + already-approved acoramidis ramping to breakeven, $500M buyback bid). ~4:1 with a real, non-zero downside. Skeptic CONFIRMED at the full cap (5).

SIGNED $1.52B definitive sale of Long Ridge to MARA (4/30/26), buyer already financing via noteholder consent, hard-dated to close Q3-2026 — removes ~$1.4B debt and flips FIP to a financeable pure-play rail equity. Live $4.81 vs $9.00 target (+87%) vs a recently-tested $3.90 floor (-19%); ONLY risk is regulatory TIMING (PJM/FERC conditioning), not deal economics. Skeptic CONFIRMED at the full cap (5); deal-day reaction was +8.4%, not the dossier's -7.4%. Held just under 90 because the floor is empirical (negative book equity, senior preferred ahead of common), not balance-sheet-backed.

Signed friendly all-cash C$44 Zijin takeover, every approval secured EXCEPT one sovereign gate (China NDRC), against a mutual-extension-only hard 2026-07-29 outside date 37 days out; ~21% gross spread to ~$31 USD with a hard gold-ounce-backed ~$23 floor (-10%), ~2x defined-risk. Skeptic CONFIRMED, cap 4 — pinned AT the cap: the single load-bearing binary is a non-economic capital-control gatekeeper that has already delayed once over the premium + Mali risk, a fatter, less-controllable binary than a routine clearance.

DURAVYU Phase 3 LUGANO wet-AMD topline, fully enrolled, NON-INFERIORITY bar (lower hurdle), three consecutive positive DSMC reads, dated 'beginning Aug-2026'; live ~$13 vs $37.50 win vs a $223M-cash-backed $5.50 floor (funded into late-2027, no dilution gun), ~3.25:1. Skeptic CONFIRMED, cap 4 — held AT the cap and not higher because DSMC clears SAFETY only (efficacy still a true open binary), it is a two-leg LUGANO->LUCIA structure (a win/miss split is live), and the date is ~2-4 weeks later than the dossier's 07-31.

Gedatolisib PDUFA 2026-07-17 (25 days out), Priority Review + RTOR, on a drug already de-risked by a positive pivotal cohort; the Skeptic's load-bearing correction is FAVORABLE — the wild-type cohort (the NDA basis) is the STRONGER arm (76%/67% risk reduction vs mutant 50%/49%), which raises approval odds, lifting the cap to 75. Live ~$88.55 vs ~$153 target vs a soft ~$60 fundamental floor, ~2.25:1. Pinned just under the cap; floor is a bear intrinsic value (not an arb backstop) that can overshoot below $60 on a CRL.

Veligrotug PDUFA 2026-06-30 — the most IMMINENT hard date in the funnel (8 days), pivotal risk retired (positive THRIVE + Breakthrough/Priority), cash-backstopped ~$8 floor. BUT the Skeptic capped at 65 by REFUTING the bull's two load-bearing claims: the 'clean dislocation' was built on REVEAL-1 being an 'unrelated failure' when it actually MET its primary endpoint, and the 'no dilution/no debt/funded-to-profitability' floor is false — VRDN closed a ~$350M dilutive raise (converts + preferred) in May-2026. Real dated catalyst, but a softer floor and an overstated mispricing narrative cap it below aggressive.

FDA PDUFA 2026-08-25 (~64d) on a LABEL EXPANSION of an already-approved molecule (high base rate) with a contractual $250M Jazz milestone on approval; ~$22.88 vs $31 target / $19 floor, ~2.1x. Skeptic capped at 60: the 'no meaningful debt / hard ~$5.5 net cash' floor claim is FALSE — a $250M Royalty Pharma royalty-backed note was taken in Mar-2026 and 30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties are diverted to repay it, so the floor's approved-franchise/royalty leg is materially encumbered, not free. Pinned at the cap.

ECLIPSE 1 Phase 3 HDV topline is registrational, fully enrolled, with a replicated 88%-Wk96 Ph2 signal and a hard cash floor (~$6.6/sh, runway to 2H-2028). BUT the Skeptic capped at 60 on a load-bearing DATE error: topline is Q1-2027, NOT Q4-2026 (Q4-2026 is only the last-patient primary-completion date) — the equity-moving readout is a quarter+ further out than logged, extending time-decay and biotech-beta exposure. Real and dated but no longer imminent; wait for the date to approach.

EU-forced Delivery Hero overhang is clearing FAVORABLY (Uber EUR20 / Aspex EUR22 premium tranches, an indicative Uber EUR33 DHER bid, deadline extended to Oct-11-2026) on top of the BEST FLOOR in the funnel — a net-cash, ~80%-Tencent (liquid, marked-daily) deep-NAV-discount holdco with a self-funding ~10%/yr buyback bid (~7:1 to floor at the corrected EUR38.35 live). Skeptic CONFIRMED at cap 58: but the catalyst is SOFT/DIFFUSE (no single re-rate day, the only hard date is being defanged by Prosus asking to KEEP the stake) and the dominant ~35% discount driver is Tencent/China, which DHER-clearing does not touch.

Board-approved Ziggo Group (VodafoneZiggo + Telenet) Euronext Amsterdam listing with 90% spun to holders, sponsor-credible (identical Sunrise-2024 playbook executed), ~2.39:1 to an $18 target vs a real ~$9.50 floor against a ~$28 book. Skeptic CONFIRMED at cap 55: but the spin is a 2027 WINDOW (no fixed record/effective date), gated on an unclosed H2-2026 regulatory buy-in, and the floor is a 'discount-persists' SoP construct (no deal-break/cash backstop) on an ERODING-moat European-cable base. Stage in on the Vodafone close.

Pivotal Phase 3 LUCIDITY readout (avexitide, PBH), guided Q3-2026, fully enrolled (mechanical data-lock), overpowered (>95%) re-test of a 5-times-replicated 50-65% effect, ~$4 near-cash floor. Skeptic CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS at cap 68. The disqualifier the bull under-weights and the reason it is NOT aggressive: the re-rate off the $4.80 low to ~$15.67 is DONE, so price upside (+79%) and downside (-74%) are roughly SYMMETRIC in magnitude — only the ~62-75% PoS tilts EV positive. A genuine defined-risk binary, but not a washed-out entry; hard cash is only ~$2.53 (the $4 floor leans on a pipeline stub).

Signed Cintas/UniFirst merger, shareholder + founder-family overhang cleared (99% on 06-12), ONLY open gate is FTC antitrust (Second Request 06-11) on a textbook #1+#2 horizontal. Skeptic capped at 3 (~60) AND flagged the spread has collapsed: at the corrected live ~$276 vs ~$287 deal value, upside is only ~+4% while a hard-block floor (~$222) is ~-20% — a ~0.2:1 raw ratio with EV now sitting essentially AT the live price. Capped upside (ARB), stale-and-soft timeline (Jan-10-2027 outside date + extensions), and the easy carry is gone — below the seat line.

Board-approved tax-free MTS spin with a strong value_conviction (5) — buying the 52-wk-low ~8x trough multiple with a peer-median SoP ~$73-90 (disciplined $53 target) as near-free optionality, floor essentially at spot. BUT the Skeptic capped at 3 (~60) on a STALE DATE: the spin slipped to a targeted 2027-01-04 effective date (CEO, 05/05/26) and the Form 10 is STILL CONFIDENTIAL (public filing only ~Sep-2026) — the gating regulatory step has not begun publicly, so the 'in-window PENDING_HARD' framing is false. Pushed just below the seat line: no public milestone for ~3 months, real further-slip and carry-cost risk, and live MTS revenue softening.

The load-bearing catalyst ALREADY FIRED AND FAILED — the FDA issued a CRL on 2026-01-30. The board's '2026-09-30 hard date' is merely the guided NDA RESUBMISSION window, not an FDA decision; the true approval/CRL is two gates out and undated (~Q1-2027). Skeptic CONFIRMED_WITH_CORRECTIONS, cap 3 (~60), status SOFT_EXTENDED. Real, funded, differentiated second-attempt asymmetry (narrow fixable CRL, revenue-backed $2.75 floor), but undated and not imminent — watchlist for the resubmission acceptance + new PDUFA assignment, which converts it back to a dated binary worth sizing.

Tax-free spin of Global Coffee Co. — the HARD enabling leg (JDE Peet's) already CLOSED 4/1/26, so there is NO live arb spread left to capture; what remains is an UNDATED SoP wait, gated on ~4.5x deleveraging + an explicit 'supportive market conditions' out-clause, separation merely 'likely early 2027.' Skeptic CONFIRMED, cap 3 (~60), status SOFT_EXTENDED. Modest, thinly-cushioned spread (R:R ~1.9, ~7.6% to a valuation-anchor floor that is not recovery-backed). Real but undated; stage only when the spin acquires a hard Form-10/record date.

Removal of BHC's ~87-88% overhang via full separation is a REAL ~21% down / ~79% up asymmetry on a good growing $5.1B franchise, but the catalyst is SOFT_EXTENDED and the Skeptic capped at 35: the fast SALE path formally ended Feb-2025, and the remaining spin has NO record date, NO outside date, NO executed agreement — gated on a BHC leverage-ratio test the parent (~$20B+ debt, ~$10B due 2027) can barely pass plus litigation. Undated, parent-gated, third-party binary; best bought on a BHC-distress flush below the floor, not chased here.

Company-run LS&H divestiture-plus-deleveraging re-rate (NOT the 'activist process' the board labeled — the May-14-2026 AGM re-elected all 10 directors cleanly). Skeptic capped at 35, status SOFT_EXTENDED: management explicitly disclaimed any timeline and any assurance of a transaction, no signed SPA exists, and the ~$1.42 floor is leverage-SOFT (FCF/credit-dependent, not cash/contract-backed) on a -4.0%-revenue, ERODING-moat base with a MATERIAL AI-displacement secular threat. Genuine ~5:1 headline asymmetry but the weakest floor + secular profile in the funnel; pass until a signed SPA with a number lands.

correlation_memo: ONE SHARED FACTOR dominates the funnel: eight of seventeen names (BBIO, AQST, ZYME, VRDN, EYPT, CELC, AMLX, VIR) are FDA / clinical binaries that all resolve on the same risk-on/off axis (biotech beta + FDA approval sentiment + the regime's identified 'thinnest-edge, run-up-priced' PDUFA lane). Seating many of them is mathematically ONE bet, not eight — and per the §1.7 independence discipline (BofA FMS cash 3.9% sell-signal, little dry powder, AI-capex the dominant under-tape factor) I will NOT let this cluster carry the book: at most 2-3 of the highest-floor members (BBIO franchise-floor, CELC/EYPT cash-floor) get real size, the rest stay scaled/waiting. Within the cluster the sub-correlations matter too: VRDN/CELC are oncology/ophthalmology one-offs while AMLX/VIR/EYPT/ZYME share trial-execution and 'clinical-attrition' risk. The PUREST STANDALONE ASYMMETRIES — the names whose resolution driver is genuinely orthogonal to both biotech beta and to each other — are the idiosyncratic/forced-seller set: FIP (a signed power-asset sale + FERC clock), AAUC (a single China-NDRC sovereign-clearance binary), PRX.AS (Tencent/China NAV + an EU forced-seller clock), KBR/LBTYK/KDP (independent spin/Form-10 mechanics), CLVT/BLCO (idiosyncratic deleveraging/parent-overhang). FIP and AAUC are the two cleanest, most-independent hard-dated bets in the book; UNF is the one remaining merger-arb but its driver (FTC) overlaps with no other name yet its spread has collapsed. Build the book around 2-3 independent idiosyncratic closes + a CAPPED biotech sleeve, never a biotech-heavy book that is secretly a single levered bet on the next risk-on tape.
memo: THE HEADLINE — ANSWERED: TWO names cleared the never-before-seen triple. Across 17 event-driven candidates, exactly two — BBIO and FIP — simultaneously earned CRO verdict A, CRO conviction 5, AND a Director score >=80 (BBIO 84, FIP 83). The priced-quality funnels have NEVER produced this band in 407+ names; the catalyst funnel produced it on the first event-driven run, which is the structural point: these are DATED EVENTS, not compounders, so a name can legitimately be table-pounding (huge live-to-target spread + hard floor + imminent forcing function) in a way a fairly-priced quality stock never is. The raw ingredients were abundant — nine names carry CRO verdict A and seven carry CRO conviction 5 — but the Director-80 gate is deliberately hard, and it bound in two ways. (1) The Skeptic's conviction_cap is the dominant filter: of the seven CRO-5 names, the Skeptic left the FULL cap only on BBIO and FIP (both CONFIRMED, no load-bearing correction); it cut VRDN to 65 (false 'no-dilution' floor + refuted 'unrelated SC failure' dislocation), CELC to 75 (soft fundamental floor), ZYME to 60 (royalty-note-encumbered floor), and held EYPT at 4/80 (safety-only DSMC + two-leg LUGANO/LUCIA structure). So five of the seven CRO-5 names were hard-capped below 80 before I scored them. (2) BBIO and FIP survived the cap AND survived my own scoring: BBIO is a PDUFA sitting on a POSITIVE Phase 3 with a profitable-franchise floor ($940M cash + already-approved acoramidis + $500M buyback bid) and ~4:1 asymmetry — about as de-risked as a regulatory binary gets; FIP is a SIGNED, FINANCED $1.52B asset sale (MARA noteholder consent already launched) that mechanically cures a distressed balance sheet, ~4.6:1, with the only live risk being regulatory TIMING, not deal economics. Neither could be killed on its load-bearing facts. They are the two table-pounding event-driven entries the sleeve was built to find. Everything else fell short on at least one axis: AAUC (79), EYPT (78), CELC (74) are A-grade and high-conviction but Skeptic-capped just under 80; VRDN/ZYME/VIR/AMLX are A-verdicts the Skeptic cut for a real flaw; UNF/AQST/PRX.AS/BLCO/LBTYK/CLVT/KDP are B-verdicts (undated, soft-floored, or spread-collapsed). SEATING PLAN under the §1.7 independence + 3.9%-cash discipline: enter-now the two purest independent closes (BBIO, FIP); scale into AAUC (sovereign binary, independent) and a CAPPED biotech sleeve (EYPT, CELC) plus PRX.AS for its fortress floor; wait-for-date on VRDN/ZYME/VIR/AMLX/LBTYK/KBR; pass on the undated/soft-floored tail (UNF spread gone, AQST/KDP/BLCO undated, CLVT weakest floor + AI-secular). Do NOT build a biotech-heavy book — eight of these are one bet on the next risk-on tape; the two triple-clearers (BBIO franchise-floored biotech, FIP idiosyncratic close) are usefully independent of each other.
